generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I've seen firsthand how critical civil defense preparedness is for national security. Communities that invest in local resilience programs see fewer disruptions and faster recoveries. It's not just about big government solutions—it's about smart, community-level preparedness that keeps us all safer. #CivilDefenseMatters
